_doc: Manual overrides for enrich_jlpt.cjs. deny: entry ids that must never receive a JLPT tag (id -> reason). pin: force the entry chosen for a CSV word ('level|raw expression' -> entry id). extra: entry ids to tag even if no CSV word selects them (id -> level).

_pin_notes.5|ラジオカセ: deck truncation of ラジオカセット; pinned to the common ラジカセ entry
_pin_notes.2|行っていらっしゃい: JMDict headword is 行ってらっしゃい
_pin_notes.2|お世話になりました: JMDict headword is お世話になる
